params.name: Orlov Tableware
params.description: Orlov Tableware, custom-made for Russian Empress Catherine the Great, is hailed as the most luxurious tableware set in 18th-century Europe, unique in size and type. This tableware was bestowed by the Empress to her favored courtiers, witnessing the glorious period of the Russian Empire, blending classical art with Rococo style, showcasing high artistic value. It reflects the luxury of the Russian court at the time, the cultural exchange between Russia and Europe, becoming an important link in in …
